title: [Survey] Help shape a no-code algo trading platform built for UK retail investors — 10 mins, fully anonymous
author: Ok_Club2393
selftext:
Hi r/ai_trading,

I'm Tomiwa, the founder of Algosark — a platform I'm building to make algorithmic trading genuinely accessible to everyday UK investors, without needing to write a single line of code.

**The problem I'm trying to solve:** Algo trading has been around for years, but every platform that exists today either requires you to code (QuantConnect, TradeStation, NinjaTrader) or gives you generic pre-built templates with no real personalisation (Tradetron, TrendSpider). That leaves the vast majority of retail investors — people who understand markets and trade actively — completely locked out.

**What Algosark does:** You complete a short risk survey (\~20 mins). Our ML pipeline uses your responses to generate a trading strategy tailored to your specific risk profile and financial goals. Before you pay a penny, you test it in a paper trading environment using real market data. If you're happy with the results, you connect your existing brokerage account via API and go live.

Pricing starts at £29/month — which, based on my early research with 50 UK retail investors, is right at the mean willingness to pay. There's a free paper trading tier so you can see the strategy work before committing.

**Why I'm posting here:** I've spoken to 50 UK investors already, but I want to hear from more of you — this community is exactly who I'm building for. Your responses directly shape how I design the platform, what features get prioritised, and how it's priced.

The survey takes around 10 minutes and covers your trading background, risk tolerance, and thoughts on algo trading. It's completely anonymous.

👉 **Take the survey here:** [https://arkofalgo.github.io/algosark\_survey.html](https://arkofalgo.github.io/algosark_survey.html)

Happy to answer any questions about what I'm building in the comments — I'd genuinely love the feedback, positive or critical.

Thanks for your time.

— Tomiwa, Algosark

*This is not financial advice. Algosark is currently in development and not yet FCA authorised.*
